title: AI Named the 2026 FIFA World Cup Winner (Shocking Prediction)
summary: A YouTube video demonstrating AI Master, a platform for comparing Claude Opus 4.8, GPT-5.5, and Gemini 3.5 Flash on 10 World Cup 2026 predictions. The host runs all three models simultaneously through a Compare feature to understand their different design philosophies and reliability on speculative tasks, grading predictions against the actual July 2026 final outcome.
writeup: The video uses AI Master's Compare feature to run Claude Opus 4.8, GPT-5.5, and Gemini 3.5 Flash simultaneously on 10 predictions for the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The aim is to surface how the three models differ in design philosophy and how reliable each is on speculative tasks, with predictions graded against the actual July 2026 final outcome. The setup doubles as a side-by-side model evaluation rather than a single forecast, treating a low-stakes guessing exercise as a way to compare model behavior. Key takeaways: the three models can be queried in parallel, and their speculative outputs are scored after the fact against the real result.
